Translation.Video Subject: Video Subject (Given a keyword, :red[AI auto-generates] video script)
Translation.Script Language: Language of the generated video script (Usually, AI automatically outputs according to the language of the input subject)
Translation.Generate Video Script and Keywords: Click to use AI to generate **Video Script** and **Video Keywords** based on the **subject**
Translation.Video script table help: Edit the full script JSON as a table. You can add or delete rows; saving will validate and write the script file again.

Translation.Generate Video Keywords: Click to use AI to generate **Video Keywords** based on the **script**

Translation.Generating Video Script and Keywords: AI is generating the video script and keywords...
Translation.Generating Video Keywords: AI is generating the video keywords...

Translation.Clip Duration: Maximum Clip Duration (Seconds) (**Not the total length of the video**, refers to the length of each **composite segment**)

Translation.Speech Key: API Key (:red[Required, either Key 1 or Key 2 is acceptable [Click to Get](https://portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_Azure_ProjectOxford/CognitiveServicesHub/~/SpeechServices)])

Translation.Background Music Source Help: Choose background music from the resource directory, upload a new file, or disable background music.
Translation.Background Music Path Help: Choose the background music used for video synthesis.
Translation.No Background Music Resources Found: No background music resources found. Please upload a background music file.
Translation.Upload Background Music Help: Upload an audio file to use as background music.
Translation.Background Music Volume: Background Music Volume (0.2 represents 20%, background sound should not be too loud)
Translation.Enable Subtitles: Enable Subtitles (If unchecked, the following settings will not take effect)
Translation.Enable Subtitle Mask Help: Before burning in new subtitles, cover the original subtitle area with a soft blurred mask.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Settings Caption: Save landscape and portrait mask regions as frame percentages. The mask is applied before new subtitles are burned in.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Left Help: Mask distance from the left edge as a frame percentage.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Top Help: Mask distance from the top edge as a frame percentage.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Width Help: Width of the covered mask region as a frame percentage.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Height Help: Height of the covered mask region as a frame percentage.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Blur Radius Help: Blur strength for the mask background and edge.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Opacity Help: Mask blend strength. Higher values cover source subtitles more strongly.
Translation.Subtitle Burn Position Help: New subtitle distance from the top edge as a frame percentage. The safe-area preview updates in real time.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Preview Caption: Upload a source video for preview, or use the currently selected source video. Uploaded files here are only used for mask preview.
Translation.Upload Subtitle Mask Preview Video Help: Only used for previewing the mask in this dialog. It will not replace the source video used for generation.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Preview Empty: Upload a preview video, or select a source video above first.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Preview Timeline Help: Drag to a frame where the source subtitles appear, then fine-tune the mask region.
Translation.Subtitle Mask Preview Frame Caption: {time} · {orientation} · red outline is the mask, blue line is the subtitle position
Translation.Subtitle Mask Preview Failed: Unable to read this video preview. Please try another video file.
Translation.Enable Auto Transcription Help: After the final video is merged, transcribe the whole video into subtitles and burn them into the output.
Translation.Custom: Custom Position (70, represents 70% from the top)
Translation.Video Script and Subject Cannot Both Be: Video Subject and Video Script cannot both be empty

Translation.Narration Copy Help: Generate the narration copy first, review or rewrite it here, then generate the editing script to match footage and timestamps.
Translation.Narration copy generated successfully: Narration copy generated. Please review and edit it.
Translation.TTS engine does not support precise subt: ⚠️ {engine} does not support precise subtitle generation
Translation.Manual subtitle editing recommendation: 💡 We recommend adding subtitles manually in a professional editor such as CapCut or Premiere Pro.
Translation.Disabled subtitles help: This TTS engine does not support subtitle generation. Please use another TTS engine.
Translation.Edge TTS features: Completely free, but service stability can vary and voice cloning is not supported.
Translation.Azure Speech Services features: Includes a free quota, then pay-as-you-go billing. An overseas credit card may be required.
Translation.Azure Speech Services use case: Enterprise use cases that need a stable service
Translation.Tencent Cloud TTS features: Includes a free quota, good voice quality, multiple voices, and fast access in mainland China.
Translation.Tencent Cloud TTS use case: Personal and enterprise users who need stable Chinese speech synthesis
Translation.Tongyi Qwen3 TTS features: Alibaba Cloud Tongyi Qwen speech synthesis with high-quality voices and multiple voice options.
Translation.High-quality Chinese speech synthesis us: Users who need high-quality Chinese speech synthesis
Translation.IndexTTS features: A locally or privately deployed IndexTTS-1.5 voice-cloning engine. Choose a resource audio file or upload a reference audio file, then synthesize narration in that voice.
Translation.IndexTTS use case: Best for fixed narrator voices, character dubbing, or generating multiple videos with the same voice. Start the IndexTTS-1.5 API service before use. Deployment package: https://pan.quark.cn/s/0767c9bcefd5
Translation.IndexTTS2 features: A locally or privately deployed IndexTTS-2 voice-cloning engine with emotion control and fuller generation parameters.
Translation.IndexTTS2 use case: Best for fixed voices, emotional narration, and local speech synthesis workflows that need finer sampling controls. Start the IndexTTS-2 API service before use.
Translation.OmniVoice features: A locally or privately deployed OmniVoice-Pack multilingual TTS engine with automatic voice generation, voice design, and reference-audio cloning.
Translation.OmniVoice use case: Best for local controllable multilingual narration, voice design, or reference-audio cloning. Start the OmniVoice-Pack API service before use.
Translation.Doubao TTS features: Volcengine Doubao speech synthesis with multiple voices and emotions, plus fast access in mainland China.
Translation.Select TTS Engine Help: Choose the text-to-speech engine you want to use.

Translation.Azure voice name format notice: Azure voice names usually follow this format: [language]-[region]-[name]Neural

Translation.OpenAI compatible protocol help: This does not require the official OpenAI model; any service that supports the OpenAI Chat Completions compatible API can be used.

Translation.Tencent Secret Key Help: Enter your Tencent Cloud Secret Key
Translation.Tencent Service Region Help: Select the Tencent Cloud TTS service region
Translation.Select Tencent TTS Voice: Select a Tencent Cloud TTS voice
Translation.Tencent More Voices Notice: See the official Tencent Cloud documentation for more voices.
Translation.Qwen TTS Model Help: Qwen TTS model name, for example qwen3-tts-flash
Translation.IndexTTS2 API URL Help: IndexTTS-2 API service URL. You can enter the service root or the full /tts endpoint.
Translation.OmniVoice API URL Help: OmniVoice-Pack API service URL. You can enter the service root or the full /tts endpoint.
Translation.OmniVoice Language Code Help: The language parameter sent to OmniVoice-Pack, such as zh or en.
Translation.OmniVoice Generation Mode Help: Automatic voice needs no extra fields; voice design uses an instruction; reference-audio cloning needs reference audio and matching text.
Translation.OmniVoice Instruct Help: Describe the desired voice, such as gender, pitch, accent, or style.
Translation.OmniVoice Instruct Placeholder: e.g. female, low pitch, british accent
Translation.OmniVoice Reference Text Help: The exact transcript of the reference audio. Required when the deployed service has ASR disabled.
Translation.OmniVoice Reference Text Placeholder: Enter the text spoken in the reference audio
Translation.OmniVoice Num Step Help: Diffusion generation steps. Higher values usually improve quality but slow generation.
Translation.OmniVoice Guidance Scale Help: Controls how strongly text conditions guide generation.
Translation.OmniVoice Duration Help: 0 lets the model decide the duration automatically.
Translation.OmniVoice Denoise Help: Ask OmniVoice-Pack to denoise the generated output.
Translation.Reference Audio Source Help: Choose a reference audio from the resource directory or upload a new one.
Translation.Reference Audio Path Help: Choose the reference audio for voice cloning (WAV/MP3, 3-10 seconds recommended)
Translation.No Reference Audio Resources Found: No reference audio resources found. Please upload a reference audio file.
Translation.Upload Reference Audio Help: Upload a clear audio clip for voice cloning
Translation.Inference Mode Help: Standard inference has higher quality but is slower. Fast inference is faster with slightly lower quality.
Translation.Sampling Temperature Help: Controls randomness. Higher values are more random; lower values are more deterministic.
Translation.Top P Help: Probability threshold for nucleus sampling. Smaller values make results more deterministic.
Translation.Top K Help: The k value for top-k sampling. 0 disables top-k.
Translation.Num Beams Help: Number of beams for beam search. Higher values may improve quality but slow generation.
Translation.Repetition Penalty Help: Higher values reduce repetition, but overly high values may sound unnatural.
Translation.Enable Sampling Help: Enable sampling for more natural speech.
Translation.IndexTTS Usage Instructions:
**Zero-shot voice cloning**

1. **Prepare reference audio**: upload or specify a clear audio file (3-10 seconds recommended)
2. **Set API URL**: make sure the IndexTTS-1.5 service is running
3. **Start synthesis**: the system will use the reference voice to synthesize new speech

**Notes**:
- Reference audio quality directly affects synthesis quality
- Use clean audio without background noise when possible
- Keep text length within a reasonable range
- The first synthesis may take longer
Translation.Emotion Mode Help: Choose the emotion control source for IndexTTS-2.
Translation.Emotion Alpha Help: Controls how strongly the emotion condition affects generation. 0 is weak, 1 is strong.
Translation.Emotion Reference Audio Path Help: Local emotion reference audio path used when emotion_mode=audio.
Translation.Emotion Text Help: Emotion description used when emotion_mode=text, such as happy, nervous, or aggrieved.
Translation.Use Random Emotion Help: Let IndexTTS-2 use random emotion sampling during generation.
Translation.Max Text Tokens Per Segment Help: Maximum text tokens per segment for IndexTTS-2 inference.
Translation.Max Mel Tokens Help: Controls the maximum mel tokens generated in one request. Higher values can produce longer audio.
Translation.IndexTTS2 Usage Instructions:
**IndexTTS-2 voice cloning**

1. **Choose a voice**: reuse IndexTTS-1.5 resource audio or upload a reference audio file
2. **Set API URL**: for example http://192.168.3.6:7863/tts, or enter the service root
3. **Tune emotion**: speaker is the default; switch to audio, vector, or text when needed
4. **Tune generation**: temperature, top_p, top_k, num_beams, repetition_penalty, and max_mel_tokens are sent directly to the IndexTTS-2 API

**Notes**:
- Reference audio quality directly affects cloning quality
- The first request may load the model and take longer
- CPU deployments are much slower than GPU deployments
Translation.OmniVoice Usage Instructions:
**OmniVoice-Pack speech synthesis**

1. **Automatic voice**: set the API URL and language, then synthesize directly.
2. **Voice design**: fill instruct with the desired gender, pitch, accent, or style.
3. **Reference-audio clone**: upload or choose reference audio and fill its matching transcript.

**Notes**:
- The default service URL is http://127.0.0.1:7866/tts
- Reference-audio cloning requires reference text when the service has no ASR model loaded
- OmniVoice returns WAV audio, and NarratoAI estimates subtitle segment timing from the audio duration
